reference: BUT THE CAPTAIN AROSE AND TIGHTENING HIS GIRDLE TUCKED UP HIS SKIRTS AND AFTER TAKING REFUGE WITH ALLAH FROM SATAN THE STONED CLOMB TO THE MAST HEAD WHENCE HE LOOKED OUT RIGHT AND LEFT AND GAZING AT THE PASSENGERS AND CREW FELL TO BUFFETING HIS FACE AND PLUCKING OUT HIS BEARD
text: But the captain arose and tightenin his girdle, tucked up his skirts, and after taking refuge with Allah from Satan the Stoned, climbed to the masthead, whence he looked out right and left and gazing at the passengers and crew, fell to buffetin his face and pluckin out his beard.
